title: Implementation in
text: Implementation in Implementations for the new component. The default is a Uniface form component. An Operating System implementation allows you to enter a command on a command line in the Signature Editor. The output of this command is a string. Related Links Component Implementations The component signature specifies the implementation a component, which determines the technology used to deploy it, such as Uniface, C, or Java.
